akamai_note: Akamai is present (ak_bmsc cookie) but does NOT block search sub-paths from datacenter — probe finding was wrong. Home (200) and SearchTypeName (200) both work. Root issue: SearchTypeName POST requires HistoryObject='{}' (JSON empty object) NOT empty string; server crashes with Object reference not set to an instance of an object otherwise. ExportCsv endpoint returns 500 regardless — session results not populated because modern Kendo AcclaimWeb uses AJAX Kendo grid (not session ExportCsv). Needs adapter update: results come via grid AJAX calls, not ExportCsv. Status: datacenter-reachable but adapter incomplete (ExportCsv path is broken).
platform_notes: Modern Kendo-based AcclaimWeb (same generation as Broward). x-aspnetmvc-version: 5.2. Adapter class is acclaimweb_http_adapter.AcclaimWebHTTPAdapter. Standard Broward-pattern search fields apply.

test_subjects.name: WEBSTER,FREDERICK
test_subjects.address: 772 NW Dupre St, Port St Lucie, FL

probe_notes: Probed 2026-06-18. Home/Index returns 200. SearchTypeName GET/POST reachable from datacenter. CORRECTED from original probe: Akamai does NOT block search. Root issue is HistoryObject field format (must be '{}' JSON, not empty). ExportCsv fails 500 — server-side issue in SharedSearchController.ExportCsv because session results aren't built via the step1 POST the same way Telerik AcclaimWeb builds them. This is a newer Kendo AcclaimWeb variant where grid data loads via Kendo DataSource AJAX (not ExportCsv). Form field: Name (not SearchOnName). DEED doctype value: 10667. TributeWeb (Tax Deed) at /TributeWeb/ is separate. 2026-06-18 re-validation: needs custom adapter that reads Kendo grid AJAX data source.
unblock_recipe: No residential IP needed. Adapter fix required: after SearchTypeName POST with HistoryObject='{}', read results from Kendo grid AJAX endpoint (to be determined via browser network capture). ExportCsv route is broken on this tenant.
